title: Winged Victory
writer: Moss Hart, Jerome Cady, John Francis Larkin
actors: Mark Daniels, Edmond O'Brien, Lon McCallister
plot: Pinkie Scariano, Alan Ross and Frankie Davis all join the Army Air Forces with hopes of becoming pilots. In training, they meet and become pals with Bobby Grills and Irving Miller, and the five struggle through the rigid training ...
